appliesTo: notes[] where tag is AI待确认
purpose: Keep AI follow-up questions visible, specific, and tied to unresolved interaction decisions.

rules.visibleInEveryMajorModule: Every major 4.0 module must include at least one visible AI待确认 note.
rules.notGenericQa: AI待确认 should lead with missing player-facing decisions, conflicts, or design risks, not only edge-case QA.
rules.targetRequired: AI待确认 still targets a concrete element/state/control id.
rules.warningStyle: Figma output must render AI待确认 with the manifest warning red family.
